creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

The port is OK. It only complains if there is no omegat.prefs file in 
the ~/.omegat directory. Creating the file is not enough because it's 
supposed to be well-formed XML.  Can you have a look at it please? 

> cat ~/.omegat/log.txt 

=================================================================== 
OmegaT-1.7.3_2 (Sat Jun 21 01:26:49 CEST 2008)  Locale en_US 

Error (PM_ERROR_READING_FILE): Unable to read file 
java.io.FileNotFoundException: /home/gahr/.omegat/omegat.prefs (No such 
file or directory) java.io.FileNotFoundException: 
/home/gahr/.omegat/omegat.prefs (No such file or directory) 
at java.io.FileInputStream.open(Native Method) at 
java.io.FileInputStream.<init>(FileInputStream.java:106) at 
java.io.FileInputStream.<init>(FileInputStream.java:66) at 
org.omegat.util.xml.XMLReader.createReader(XMLReader.java:102) 
at org.omegat.util.xml.XMLReader.<init>(XMLReader.java:81) at 
org.omegat.util.xml.XMLStreamReader.setStream(XMLStreamReader.java:81) 
at 
org.omegat.util.xml.XMLStreamReader.setStream(XMLStreamReader.java:65) 
at org.omegat.util.Preferences.doLoad(Preferences.java:295) at 
org.omegat.util.Preferences.<clinit>(Preferences.java:135) at 
org.omegat.gui.main.MainWindow.createMainComponents(MainWindow.java:138) 
at org.omegat.gui.main.MainWindow.<init>(MainWindow.java:125) at 
org.omegat.Main.main(Main.java:87) 


Thanks!
